articles.excerpt: Gaps in flood protection insurance will be examined as some homes in high-risk areas can't obtain affordable premiums.
articles.content:
A new body is to be established to examine gaps in flood protection insurance with a growing number of homes in high-risk areas unable to obtain affordable premiums.
Tánaiste and Minister for Financ…
articles.author: Barry Lenihan

articles.title: Residents plan court challenge to Brisbane's $3.6b Olympic stadium
articles.excerpt: The Queensland government wants site work to begin on Brisbane's $3.6 billion Olympic stadium on Monday as residents plan a court challenge and Indigenous protesters refuse to move.
articles.content:
As Brisbane prepares for the 2032 Olympics, it is facing persistent opposition to its biggest feature, the Olympic stadium.
The state government wants site work to begin from Monday on the $3.6-bill…
articles.author: Annie Guest
